prompt: We're onboarding a new institutional client — a family trust with three trustees, two of whom are US persons and one is a UK resident. The trust document names a corporate trustee as well. Walk me through the compliance requirements for opening this account.

assertions.text: Addresses CIP/KYC for each trustee individually
Flags the non-US trustee as requiring enhanced due diligence
Provides 3+ specific rule numbers or regulatory citations
Identifies 3+ distinct edge cases or pitfalls specific to trust entities with foreign persons
